name: White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Heavy Whipping Cream (1/2 Cup), at room temperature
Cream Cheese (1 Pound), at room temperature
Eggs (4 Large), separated, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: Melt butter. Combine cracker crumbs, melted butter, and sugar in a bowl and press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes. Once cooled, grease the sides of the pan.
2. For the filling: In a double boiler, melt chocolate, stirring frequently. Add cream and blend well. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Add egg yolks and continue to beat. Incorporate white chocolate mixture and vanilla. Beat for about 3 minutes. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Blend whites into the white chocolate mixture. Pour into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F for one hour. Turn off the oven and let the cake sit in the pan for an additional hour before serving.
